title: Tenkaichi Evolution
description: Tenkaichi Evolution is a alien evo addon that aims to add dragon ball aliens to minecraft but as if they were in the omnitrix
body:
![Tenkaichi Evolution](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b207b42bb33a9261a1b0a253ff801cc60ee36f6.png)

Tenkaichi Evolution aims to add multiple aliens from the Dragon Ball universe into Minecraft, reimagined as if they were in the Omnitrix. This pack features all-new custom designs based on these alien races, including the official 5yl Saiyan variant (used with permission from The Ink Tank).

Originally, the Saiyans were strictly inspired by the 5yl version and were only meant to have their Primal form (Ssj4). However, due to popular demand, I’ve decided to add the Oozaru (Great Ape) as well!
 
Currently released:

Sayain with primal transformation (currently, the Saiyan is a random transformation, but in the Oozaru update, I will be adding the obtainment way with the oozaru update)
10k skin inspired by the 5yl Saiyan
Zenkai Boost (Passive): Saiyans grow stronger as they fight. Gain a significant boost to Strength and Toughness when falling below 50% health
Oozaru (great ape)
Saiyan boss "Way to obtain Saiyan."
blutz wave machine(way to activate oozaru without full moon)
Advancements
Skins in the accessory menu with a hidden skin~~~~
Planned to release:

Obtainment items
Namekians
Zarbonians (Zarbon’s race)
Konatsians
Machine Mutants



Special Thanks:

Gorrini (creator of Pepsi Evolution): for helping me get the transformation working
Ender2466 (creator of the five project) for play testing and help with fixing bugs
Majorsirius: for play testing

Requires:
KubeJS,
Alien Evo and its requirements
